Dropdown

Selection dropdown using <lyte-dropdown> and <lyte-multi-dropdown> Slyte DOM. Figma: Input_Dropdown_Core — States: Default, Selected, Disabled, Error with optional label/hint. Includes Creatable and Multi Select variants.

Inputs Figma Synced 15 States × 1 Size
Default — Empty
Empty
HTML
<lyte-dropdown lt-prop-placeholder="Select an option">
  <template is="registerYield" yield-name="yield">
    <lyte-drop-box><lyte-drop-body>
      <lyte-drop-item data-value="opt1">Option 1</lyte-drop-item>
      <lyte-drop-item data-value="opt2">Option 2</lyte-drop-item>
      <lyte-drop-item data-value="opt3">Option 3</lyte-drop-item>
    </lyte-drop-body></lyte-drop-box>
  </template>
</lyte-dropdown>
SCSS
/* Figma: State=Default — border #D5D6D9, bg #FFFFFF, radius 6px */
lyte-dropdown lyte-drop-button {
  border: 1px solid var(--zc-color-huegrey-border-huegrey-border-fairish, #D5D6D9);
  border-radius: var(--zc-radius-r, 6px);
  background: var(--zc-color-black-white-surface-white-surface, #FFFFFF);
  padding: 9px 10px;
  height: 36px;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: border-color 0.15s ease, box-shadow 0.15s ease;
}

/* Figma: State=Hover — border #0D4EF2 */
lyte-dropdown lyte-drop-button:hover {
  border-color: var(--zc-color-primary-border-primary-border-default, #0D4EF2);
}

/* Figma: State=Active — border #0D4EF2 + elevation */
lyte-dropdown.lyteDropdownActive lyte-drop-button {
  border-color: var(--zc-color-primary-border-primary-border-default, #0D4EF2);
  box-shadow: 0px 2px 2px 0px rgba(13, 78, 242, 0.05), 0px 2px 4px 0px rgba(13, 78, 242, 0.08);
}
Selected — Value Chosen
Selected
With Clear
HTML
<!-- Selected -->
<lyte-dropdown lt-prop-selected="opt1" lt-prop-placeholder="Select an option">
  <template is="registerYield" yield-name="yield">
    <lyte-drop-box><lyte-drop-body>
      <lyte-drop-item data-value="opt1">Option 1</lyte-drop-item>
    </lyte-drop-body></lyte-drop-box>
  </template>
</lyte-dropdown>

<!-- Selected with clear icon -->
<lyte-dropdown lt-prop-selected="opt2" lt-prop-show-deselect-icon="true">
  <template is="registerYield" yield-name="yield">
    <lyte-drop-box><lyte-drop-body>
      <lyte-drop-item data-value="opt2">Option 2</lyte-drop-item>
    </lyte-drop-body></lyte-drop-box>
  </template>
</lyte-dropdown>
SCSS
/* Figma: State=Selected — same border, value text is default color */
lyte-dropdown .lyteDropdownLabel {
  color: var(--zc-color-neutral-text-neutral-text-default, #37383C);
  font-size: var(--zc-p2-font-size, 14px);
}

/* Figma: State=Selected With Clear — deselect icon visible */
lyte-dropdown.lyteDropdownWithDeselectIcon lyte-drop-remove {
  display: inline-flex;
  cursor: pointer;
}
Disabled — Non-interactive
Before (Empty)
After (Filled)
HTML
<!-- Disabled Before (empty) -->
<lyte-dropdown lt-prop-placeholder="Select an option" lt-prop-disabled="true">
  <template is="registerYield" yield-name="yield">
    <lyte-drop-box><lyte-drop-body>
      <lyte-drop-item data-value="opt1">Option 1</lyte-drop-item>
    </lyte-drop-body></lyte-drop-box>
  </template>
</lyte-dropdown>

<!-- Disabled After (with selection) -->
<lyte-dropdown lt-prop-selected="opt1" lt-prop-disabled="true">
  <template is="registerYield" yield-name="yield">
    <lyte-drop-box><lyte-drop-body>
      <lyte-drop-item data-value="opt1">Option 1</lyte-drop-item>
    </lyte-drop-body></lyte-drop-box>
  </template>
</lyte-dropdown>
SCSS
/* Figma: State=Disabled Before / Disabled After — bg #F5F5F5, border #D5D6D9 */
lyte-dropdown.lyteDropdown-disabled lyte-drop-button {
  background: var(--zc-color-huegrey-surface-huegrey-surface-subtle-hover, #F5F5F5);
  border-color: var(--zc-color-huegrey-border-huegrey-border-fairish, #D5D6D9);
  cursor: not-allowed;
  pointer-events: none;
  opacity: 0.65;
}
Error — Validation Failed
Error
This field is required
HTML
<div class="zc-dropdown zc-dropdown-error">
  <lyte-dropdown lt-prop-placeholder="Select an option">
    <template is="registerYield" yield-name="yield">
      <lyte-drop-box><lyte-drop-body>
        <lyte-drop-item data-value="opt1">Option 1</lyte-drop-item>
      </lyte-drop-body></lyte-drop-box>
    </template>
  </lyte-dropdown>
  <span class="zc-dropdown-hint zc-dropdown-hint-error">This field is required</span>
</div>
SCSS
/* Figma: State=Error — error border + bg on trigger */
.zc-dropdown-error lyte-dropdown lyte-drop-button {
  border-color: var(--zc-color-error-border-error-border-default, #CC1914);
  background: var(--zc-color-error-surface-error-surface-subtle, #FEF6F6);
}
.zc-dropdown-hint-error {
  color: var(--zc-color-error-text-error-text-default, #CC1914);
}
With Label & Hint
Default
Helper text goes here
Error
This field is required
Disabled
This field is disabled
HTML
<!-- With label and hint -->
<div class="zc-dropdown">
  <label class="zc-dropdown-label">Field Label</label>
  <lyte-dropdown lt-prop-placeholder="Select an option">
    <template is="registerYield" yield-name="yield">
      <lyte-drop-box><lyte-drop-body>
        <lyte-drop-item data-value="opt1">Option 1</lyte-drop-item>
      </lyte-drop-body></lyte-drop-box>
    </template>
  </lyte-dropdown>
  <span class="zc-dropdown-hint">Helper text goes here</span>
</div>

<!-- Error with label -->
<div class="zc-dropdown zc-dropdown-error">
  <label class="zc-dropdown-label">Field Label</label>
  <lyte-dropdown lt-prop-placeholder="Select an option">...</lyte-dropdown>
  <span class="zc-dropdown-hint zc-dropdown-hint-error">This field is required</span>
</div>
SCSS
.zc-dropdown {
  display: inline-flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 6px;
}
.zc-dropdown-label {
  font-size: var(--zc-p2-font-size, 14px);
  font-weight: var(--zc-p2-font-weight-semibold, 600);
  color: var(--zc-color-neutral-text-neutral-text-default, #37383C);
}
.zc-dropdown-hint {
  font-size: var(--zc-p3-font-size, 12px);
  color: var(--zc-color-neutral-text-neutral-text-subtle, #9EA0A7);
}
.zc-dropdown-hint-error {
  color: var(--zc-color-error-text-error-text-default, #CC1914);
}
Creatable — Default / Placeholder
Base
HTML
<lyte-dropdown lt-prop-placeholder="Search or create..."
               lt-prop-search="true"
               class="zc-dropdown zc-creatable-dropdown">
  <template is="registerYield" yield-name="yield">
    <lyte-drop-box><lyte-drop-body>
      <lyte-drop-item data-value="opt1">Option 1</lyte-drop-item>
      <lyte-drop-item data-value="opt2">Option 2</lyte-drop-item>
      <lyte-drop-item data-value="opt3">Option 3</lyte-drop-item>
    </lyte-drop-body></lyte-drop-box>
  </template>
</lyte-dropdown>
SCSS
.zc-creatable-dropdown {
  min-width: 240px;
}
.zc-creatable-dropdown .lyteDDHeader {
  border: 1px solid var(--zc-color-huegrey-border-huegrey-border-fairish, #D5D6D9);
  border-radius: var(--zc-radius-r, 6px);
  background: var(--zc-color-black-white-surface-white-surface, #FFFFFF);
}
Creatable — Open / Search Active
With Typed Value
HTML
<lyte-dropdown lt-prop-placeholder="Search or create..."
               lt-prop-search="true"
               class="zc-dropdown zc-creatable-dropdown zc-creatable-dropdown-focus">
  <template is="registerYield" yield-name="yield">
    <lyte-drop-box><lyte-drop-body>
      <lyte-drop-item data-value="opt1">Option 1</lyte-drop-item>
    </lyte-drop-body></lyte-drop-box>
  </template>
</lyte-dropdown>
SCSS
.zc-creatable-dropdown-focus .lyteDDHeader,
.zc-creatable-dropdown:focus-within .lyteDDHeader {
  border-color: var(--zc-color-primary-border-primary-border-default, #0D4EF2);
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(13, 78, 242, 0.15);
}
Creatable — "+ Create" Action Row
With Create Row
Create "New Item"
No Match + Create
No matching options
Create "Custom Value"
HTML
<lyte-dropdown lt-prop-placeholder="Search or create..."
               lt-prop-search="true"
               class="zc-dropdown zc-creatable-dropdown">
  <template is="registerYield" yield-name="yield">
    <lyte-drop-box><lyte-drop-body>
      <lyte-drop-item data-value="opt1">Option 1</lyte-drop-item>
      <lyte-drop-item class="zc-creatable-dropdown-create-row"
                       data-value="__create__">
        <i class="fas fa-plus"></i>
        Create "New Item"
      </lyte-drop-item>
    </lyte-drop-body></lyte-drop-box>
  </template>
</lyte-dropdown>
SCSS
.zc-creatable-dropdown-create-row {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 8px;
  padding: 8px 12px;
  color: var(--zc-color-primary-text-primary-text-default, #0D4EF2);
  font-weight: 600;
  cursor: pointer;
  border-top: 1px solid var(--zc-color-huegrey-border-huegrey-border-fairish, #D5D6D9);
}
.zc-creatable-dropdown-create-row:hover {
  background: var(--zc-color-primary-surface-primary-surface-subtle, #F5F8FE);
}
.zc-creatable-dropdown-no-match {
  padding: 8px 12px;
  color: var(--zc-color-neutral-text-neutral-text-subtle, #9EA0A7);
  font-size: 12px;
}
Creatable — Disabled
Disabled Empty
Disabled Filled
HTML
<lyte-dropdown lt-prop-placeholder="Search or create..."
               lt-prop-search="true"
               lt-prop-disabled="true"
               class="zc-dropdown zc-creatable-dropdown">
  <template is="registerYield" yield-name="yield">
    <lyte-drop-box><lyte-drop-body>
      <lyte-drop-item data-value="opt1">Option 1</lyte-drop-item>
    </lyte-drop-body></lyte-drop-box>
  </template>
</lyte-dropdown>
SCSS
lyte-dropdown.zc-creatable-dropdown[lt-prop-disabled="true"] .lyteDDHeader {
  background: var(--zc-color-huegrey-surface-huegrey-surface-subtle-hover, #F5F5F5);
  border-color: var(--zc-color-huegrey-border-huegrey-border-fairish, #D5D6D9);
  cursor: not-allowed;
  opacity: 0.65;
}
Multi Select — Default
Default
HTML
<lyte-multi-dropdown lt-prop-placeholder="Select items">
  <template is="registerYield" yield-name="yield">
    <lyte-drop-box>
      <lyte-drop-body>
        <lyte-drop-item data-value="red">Red</lyte-drop-item>
        <lyte-drop-item data-value="green">Green</lyte-drop-item>
        <lyte-drop-item data-value="blue">Blue</lyte-drop-item>
      </lyte-drop-body>
    </lyte-drop-box>
  </template>
</lyte-multi-dropdown>
Multi Select — With Search
Searchable
HTML
<lyte-multi-dropdown lt-prop-placeholder="Search & select..."
                     lt-prop-search="true">
  <template is="registerYield" yield-name="yield">
    <lyte-drop-box><lyte-drop-body>
      <lyte-drop-item data-value="apple">Apple</lyte-drop-item>
      <lyte-drop-item data-value="banana">Banana</lyte-drop-item>
    </lyte-drop-body></lyte-drop-box>
  </template>
</lyte-multi-dropdown>
Multi Select — Disabled
Disabled
HTML
<lyte-multi-dropdown lt-prop-placeholder="Disabled"
                     lt-prop-disabled="true">
  <template is="registerYield" yield-name="yield">
    <lyte-drop-box><lyte-drop-body>
      <lyte-drop-item data-value="opt1">Option 1</lyte-drop-item>
    </lyte-drop-body></lyte-drop-box>
  </template>
</lyte-multi-dropdown>
